## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss CodeRabbit's concerns about GrowthX's SEO strategy and content quality, and determine next steps for the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX acknowledged issues with initial content delivery, clarifying process and mistakes made](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [CodeRabbit expressed concerns about SEO expertise and strategy, but agreed to move forward cautiously](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [GrowthX to remove CodeRabbit's logo from their homepage temporarily as a courtesy](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [Next steps include CodeRabbit reviewing and approving content topics, GrowthX preparing a calibration blog](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)

## Topics

### Initial Content Quality Concerns

  - [CodeRabbit deemed GrowthX's first content delivery as "really, really bad work" and "nonsense"](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [GrowthX admitted mistakes were made, including forgetting to upload target keywords](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Aida clarified the initial batch was meant to present ideas for discussion, not final content](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)

### SEO Expertise and Strategy

  - [CodeRabbit questioned GrowthX's SEO expertise and approach to keyword strategy](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Confusion arose over competitor keyword rankings and how GrowthX generated keyword suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
  - [GrowthX affirmed Aida's expertise, citing her role in leading kickoffs and high client continuation rate](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Andi (ops person) acknowledged misstep in downplaying keyword importance, clarifying her non-SEO background](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)

### Moving Forward

  - [Despite concerns, CodeRabbit agreed to continue the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [GrowthX to proceed with the same team (Aida leading SEO strategy)](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [CodeRabbit to review and greenlight a couple of content topics](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare a calibration blog for review early next week](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)

### Logo Usage

  - [CodeRabbit requested GrowthX remove their logo from the homepage temporarily](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [GrowthX agreed, noting they had already considered this action](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)

## Next Steps

  - [CodeRabbit to review and approve 2-3 content topics from the content OS](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [GrowthX to remove CodeRabbit's logo from their homepage](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [GrowthX to choose a blog topic for calibration and deliver it early next week](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Both parties to approach the engagement with a fresh start, moving past initial issues](https://fathom.video/share/nhZ3s55vLEtZzBZ7QehXsNmL19NR8Xjq?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
